headline: Walmart announces the adoption of Rule 10b5-1 stock trading plans by executives C. Douglas McMillon, Daniel J. Bartlett, and David Guggina.
investor_impact: These pre-arranged stock sales are routine measures for executive asset diversification and tax planning. They do not signal a shift in company fundamentals, and the executives continue to meet Walmart's stock ownership guidelines.
key_figures: C. Douglas McMillon: 19,416 shares to be sold monthly from June 2026 through January 2027 (maximum 155,328 shares)
Daniel J. Bartlett: $416,666.67 worth of stock to be sold monthly from July 2026 to July 1, 2029 (maximum $15,000,000)
David Guggina: Net shares remaining after taxes from a vesting of 21,108 restricted shares on May 5, 2026
